results.definition_en: What makes one laugh; something funny.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 幽默、笑點；引人發笑的特質或情緒。
results.example_en: She has a great sense of humour.

results.definition_en: Water made hard by being very cold.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 冰；冷凍變硬的水。
results.example_en: Put some ice in my drink.

results.definition_en: A thought in the mind.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 想法、念頭；心中浮現的概念。
results.example_en: I have a good idea for the project.
results.example_zh_tw: 我對這個計畫有個好點子。

results.definition_en: A sudden push of the mind to do a thing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 衝動、念頭；突然想做的心理動力。
results.example_en: On impulse, she bought the flowers.
results.example_zh_tw: 她一時衝動買下了那些花。

results.definition_en: The act of becoming greater in number or size.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 增加、增長；數量或規模變大。
results.example_en: There is an increase in the price of bread.

results.definition_en: The making of things in factories, or the trade of doing so.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 工業、產業；工廠製造業及相關行業。
results.example_en: The car industry is very large.

results.definition_en: A coloured liquid used for writing or printing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 墨水；用於書寫或印刷的有色液體。
results.example_en: She wrote her name in black ink.

results.definition_en: A small living thing with six legs, like a bee or ant.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 昆蟲；六足小型生物，如蜜蜂或螞蟻。
results.example_en: A small insect was on the leaf.

results.definition_en: A thing made to do a special work, like a tool or one that gives music.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 器具、樂器；專用工具或演奏之器物。
results.example_en: The piano is her favourite instrument.

results.definition_en: A way of paying money so that one is helped if a bad thing happens.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 保險；定期付款以備不時之需的制度。
results.example_en: She has insurance for her car.

results.definition_en: A feeling of wanting to know more about a thing.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 興趣、關注；想多了解某事的感覺。
results.example_en: He has an interest in old books.

results.definition_en: Something new that has been made for the first time.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 發明；首次創造的新事物。
results.example_en: The phone was a great invention.
results.example_zh_tw: 電話是一項偉大的發明。

results.definition_en: A hard grey metal used for many things, like nails or pots.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 鐵；堅硬的灰色金屬，用途廣泛。
results.example_en: The gate is made of iron.

results.definition_en: A soft sweet food made from fruit and sugar.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 果凍；以水果與糖製成的軟質甜點。
results.example_en: I have jelly with my bread.

results.definition_en: The act of putting two things together.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 連接、加入；將兩物或多人合在一起。
results.example_en: Join the two ropes to make a longer one.
results.example_zh_tw: 把兩條繩子接起來成一條長的。

results.definition_en: A trip from one place to another.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 旅程、旅行；從一地到另一地的行程。
results.example_en: It was a long journey to the city.
results.example_zh_tw: 到那座城市的路途很長。

results.definition_en: A person who decides what is right in a law court.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 法官；於法庭裁定是非的人。
results.example_en: The judge said he was not guilty.

results.definition_en: A sudden push off the ground with the legs.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 跳、跳躍；以雙腿用力離地的動作。
results.example_en: The dog gave a big jump over the fence.
results.example_zh_tw: 那隻狗一躍越過了圍欄。

results.definition_en: A strong push made with the foot.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 踢；用腳用力推或擊打。
results.example_en: Give the ball a hard kick.

results.definition_en: A touch with the lips, often to show love.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 親吻；以雙唇接觸他人，常為表達愛意。
results.example_en: She gave the baby a kiss.

results.definition_en: All that one knows about a thing or things.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 知識、學識；所知的全部內容。
results.example_en: She has knowledge of many languages.

results.definition_en: The dry part of the earth, not the sea.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 陸地、土地；地球乾燥之處，非海洋。
results.example_en: The boat came to land at noon.

results.definition_en: The words people use to say things to one another.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 語言；人們交流所用的詞彙系統。
results.example_en: She speaks three languages.

results.definition_en: The sound one makes when one is happy or finds a thing funny.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 笑、笑聲；快樂或覺得有趣時所發之聲。
results.example_en: Her story made me laugh.

results.definition_en: A rule made by the government that all must keep.
results.gloss_zh_tw: 法律；政府制定、全民須遵守的規範。
results.example_en: It is the law to wear a seat belt.
